label: Session Role
description: Discriminates SESSION instances by the YAC role that owns the session (CASE-389). Term-backed so values are constrained + discoverable via list_terms. Mutable — new roles added additively when new YAC types come online.

terms.label: APP-KB
terms.description: App YAC building the Knowledge Base (WIP-KB).

terms.label: APP-DND
terms.description: App YAC building the DnD compendium (WIP-DnD).

terms.label: FRanC
terms.description: Field Reporter — captures session reports, papers, firesides.

terms.label: BUG-YAC
terms.description: Bug-triage YAC; per-task focus, not adopting the SESSION model in Phase 1 but the role exists for completeness.

terms.label: DOC-YAC
terms.description: Documentation YAC; same Phase-1 deferral as BUG-YAC.
